mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM STUDENTS ST WHERE ST.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true' AND ST.LOGIN_ACCOUNT = #{loginAccount}

SELECT ST.ID, ST.LOGIN_ACCOUNT, ST.PASSWORD, ST.USERNAME, ST.DATE_OF_BIRTH, ST.EMAIL, ST.ROLE_ID, ST.UPDATED_TIME, ST.VISIBLE_FLG FROM STUDENTS ST WHERE ST.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true' AND (ST.LOGIN_ACCOUNT = #{username} OR ST.EMAIL = #{username})
SELECT ST.ID, ST.LOGIN_ACCOUNT, ST.PASSWORD, ST.USERNAME, ST.DATE_OF_BIRTH, ST.EMAIL, ST.ROLE_ID, ST.UPDATED_TIME, ST.VISIBLE_FLG FROM STUDENTS ST WHERE ST.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true' AND ST.ID = #{id}

SELECT ST.ID, ST.LOGIN_ACCOUNT, ST.PASSWORD, ST.USERNAME, ST.DATE_OF_BIRTH, ST.EMAIL, ST.ROLE_ID, ST.UPDATED_TIME, ST.VISIBLE_FLG FROM STUDENTS ST WHERE ST.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true' AND ST.LOGIN_ACCOUNT = #{loginAccount}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STUDENTS (ID, LOGIN_ACCOUNT, PASSWORD, USERNAME, DATE_OF_BIRTH, EMAIL, ROLE_ID, UPDATED_TIME, VISIBLE_FLG) VALUES (#{id}, #{loginAccount}, #{password}, #{username}, #{dateOfBirth}, #{email}, #{roleId}, #{updatedTime}, #{visibleFlg})
mapper.update: UPDATE STUDENTS SET LOGIN_ACCOUNT = #{loginAccount}, PASSWORD = #{password}, USERNAME = #{username}, DATE_OF_BIRTH = #{dateOfBirth}, EMAIL = #{email}, ROLE_ID = #{roleId}, UPDATED_TIME = #{updatedTime}, VISIBLE_FLG = #{visibleFlg} WHERE ID = #{id}
